description: Canonical, language-neutral test vectors for CF-ID and related identities. Any conformant implementation MUST reproduce all values in this file exactly. Source: SPEC-2.0.md Appendices A and B.

round3_vectors.description: round3(x) = trunc(x*1000 + 0.5) / 1000, truncation toward zero (NOT round-half-up). This is the single most common source of cross-language non-conformance.

wcag_vectors.description: WCAG 2.x contrast ratio, computed via relative luminance from sRGB.

cf_spectral_id_v2_vectors.description: Flat 50% reflectance, 71 samples (5nm, 380-730nm). LAB.L MUST match the v1.0 vector exactly (identical luminance under flat reflectance), confirming sound CMF/D65 interpolation; a/b and the resulting cf_id differ slightly and are both valid (parallel identity schemes).

claim_digest_vector.description: claim_digest = sha256:hex(sha256(canonical_json(claim_without_claim_digest))). Demonstrates that canonical JSON encoding (alphabetical keys, no whitespace, integers without decimal points) produces identical digests across implementations -- verified cross-language (FARD vs Python json.dumps(sort_keys=True)).
